home.metatitle: Armando's Portfolio - Web and Mobile Apps Developer
home.metadescription: Welcome to my portfolio! I'm Armando, a passionate Developer dedicated to creating beautiful and functional digital experiences.
home.description: With a passion for creating digital solutions that combine design and functionality. I also have experience in backend and other software development technologies, which allows me to have a comprehensive view of projects.

notFound.title: Page Not Found
notFound.description: It looks like you’ve reached a forgotten corner of the site. The link may be broken or the page may have been moved.

serverError.title: Server Error
serverError.description: Sorry, something went wrong on our side. Please try reloading the page or come back later.

aboutMe.metadescription: Learn more about Armando, a passionate Developer with a strong background in modern technologies and continuous learning.
aboutMe.title: About Me
aboutMe.description: Software developer with a strong passion for technology and continuous learning. Four years ago, I began my programming journey through online courses, starting with Python and exploring from the basics of HTML and CSS to more advanced frameworks such as Django, Flask, and Tkinter. Over time, I discovered new learning platforms like Udemy, Platzi, and Coursera, which allowed me to expand my stack with modern technologies: JavaScript, React, Next.js, Tailwind, Git/GitHub, SQL and NoSQL databases, along with solid foundations in software engineering. Recently, I completed the Meta Front-End Developer Certificate (Coursera), where I built practical projects with React, applied UX/UI principles, and developed a capstone project that integrated all my learning.

certifications.title: Certifications
certifications.platzi: I studied web development fundamentals and more with courses from Platzi. I learned to build responsive websites and web applications using the latest technologies.
certifications.metaFrontend: I completed the Meta Front-End Developer specialization on Coursera, where I gained advanced front-end development skills, including React, JavaScript, and responsive design.
certifications.udemy: I completed several courses on Udemy, including a full course on Flutter and Dart, where I learned to develop cross-platform mobile applications with attractive and functional interfaces.

projects.metadescription: Explore my personal projects, showcasing my skills in Web and Mobile development.
projects.title: Projects
projects.description: Some of my personal projects, where I have applied my skills in Web and Mobile development.

pokemon.title: Fetching Pokémon Data
pokemon.description: A project about retrieving Pokémon data using the Pokémon API. Popular in web programming courses and a basic exercise to understand REST API consumption.

web_duo.title: Web Duo Corazon
web_duo.description: Website for a circus artist duo (Duo Corazon). Consists of three main sections with an attractive design and image gallery.

web_theliazeed.title: Web The Liazeed
web_theliazeed.description: Website for an entertainment company that offers a variety of artistic performances across Europe.

teslo_shop.title: Teslo Shop
teslo_shop.description: An e-commerce platform for selling sneakers, built with Next.js and Tailwind CSS. Features include user authentication, product management, and payment processing with PayPal. Utilizes a PostgreSQL database with Prisma as ORM.

my_Tree.title: My Tree Web Application
my_Tree.description: A web application for managing family trees, where you can build a bloodline family map by adding direct descendants, built with Next.js and Tailwind CSS. It includes node functionality to visualize the family tree structure.
my_Tree.heroSubtitle: Visualize your family tree automatically and intuitively

projectDescription.title: About the Project
projectDescription.paragraph1: FamilyTree is an innovative web application designed to simplify the visualization and management of family trees. It allows users to create family connections intuitively, by directly adding parents and children.
projectDescription.paragraph2: The system automatically calculates all blood relationships, identifying uncles, nephews, grandparents, cousins, and other kinships without the user having to manually specify them.

ideacion.title: 1. Ideation and Planning
ideacion.text: Problem identification: difficulty in clearly and automatically visualizing extensive family relationships.

brainstorming.title: 2. Brainstorming and Sketching
brainstorming.text: Definition of key features: Insertion of direct relationships such as children and parents. Automatic calculation of relationships with the user, visualization in nodes.

maquetacion.title: 3. Mockup and Design
maquetacion.text: Design of wireframes and user flows, defining the information architecture and interaction patterns.

prototiping.title: 4. Prototyping and User Testing
prototiping.text: Development of interactive mockups in Figma, UX/UI validation with potential users, and design refinement.

development.title: 5. Development and Implementation
development.text: Implementation with Next.js 15, TypeScript, relationship calculation algorithms, and node visualization. Database with Prisma and Cloudinary for image storage.

login.title: Login and Registration Page
login.text: Simple interface to log in with an existing account or create a new one. Minimalist design that facilitates the authentication process.

home.title: Home with and without User
home.text: Initial landing page that clearly and attractively presents login and registration options for new visitors. Once authenticated, the user will be able to access their profile creation and explore the available functionalities.

familyManagement.title: Family Management
familyManagement.text: Add parents and children using a form where the only required options are name and relationship selection.

autoView.title: Automatic Visualization
autoView.text: Once you add family members, the system automatically calculates and displays all family relationships: uncles, cousins, grandparents, nephews, and more.

development.title: Node View
development.text: Interactive visual representation of the family tree in graph form, allowing for intuitive navigation through generations and visualizing the connections between family members.

spendiary.title: Spendiary
spendiary.description: A personal finance management application 100% offline built with React Native. It allows users to track their expenses, set budgets, and visualize their financial health through intuitive charts and reports.
spendiary.heroSubtitle: Financial data sovereignty: private, offline, and efficient

projectDescription.title: About the Project
projectDescription.paragraph1: Spendiary is a privacy-first personal finance mobile app built with React Native. Unlike cloud-based alternatives, it operates 100% offline, ensuring users retain total ownership of their data through high-performance local storage and zero external tracking.
projectDescription.paragraph2: The app features intuitive expense tracking, dynamic data visualization with charts and heatmaps, and a secure backup system using JSON files. Spendiary empowers users to manage their finances with confidence, prioritizing privacy.

ideacion.title: 1. Ideation & Planning
ideacion.text: Focusing on data sovereignty and removing the friction of cloud sign-ups for daily expense management.

brainstorming.title: 2. Data Architecture
brainstorming.text: Defining a flexible JSON schema to enable data portability (Export/Import) and ultra-fast persistence.

maquetacion.title: 3. User-Centric UI/UX
maquetacion.text: Designing a clean interface with native Light/Dark mode support and optimized navigation flows.

prototiping.title: 4. Data Visualization
prototiping.text: Iterating on visual components (pie charts and heatmaps) to transform raw data into actionable financial insights.

development.title: 5. Tech Stack
development.text: Leveraging React Native's New Architecture, Zustand for state management, and MMKV for storage performance.

security.title: Security & Biometrics
security.text: Data protection through local PIN and biometric authentication (Fingerprint or FaceID). A native security layer that ensures only the user has access to their sensitive financial information.

transactions.title: Transaction Management
transactions.text: Fluid logging of income and expenses with support for multiple categories. Optimized implementation using FlashList to maintain 60fps performance even with thousands of records.

analytics.title: Advanced Visual Analytics
analytics.text: Dynamic visualization of financial habits using interactive pie charts and heatmaps. Developed with Victory Native and Skia for a high-level analytical visual experience.

budgets.title: Budget Planning
budgets.text: Smart system to create budgets and spending limits per category. It allows users to monitor their financial health and adjust their goals in real-time intuitively.

portability_and_appearance.title: Portability and Appearance
portability_and_appearance.text: 100% offline functionality with a JSON-based export and import system. The user has total ownership of their data, enabling backups and restorations without cloud dependency.

footer.message: Empowering your financial management with privacy and efficiency
